Name: SES-001
Description: A session token is issued only after a successful authentication — not before, and not merely from loading the app

Name: SESSION-003
Description: The client-side token encryption key must not be recoverable from the same storage as the ciphertext it protects

Name: SESSION-002
Description: Clearing the session credential from browser storage forces re-authentication on the next load

Name: SES-003
Description: A captured refresh token can no longer be redeemed for a new access token once the session that issued it has logged out

Name: SES-002
Description: A captured access token is no longer honored by the real API once the session that issued it has logged out

Name: SESSION-001
Description: An authenticated session survives a full page reload without forcing re-login
